Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class EmbeddedServiceMenuItem

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.EmbeddedServiceMenuItem
public class EmbeddedServiceMenuItem extends Object

Java class for EmbeddedServiceMenuItem complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="EmbeddedServiceMenuItem">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="channel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="channelType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}EmbeddedServiceChannelType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="customUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="displayOrder" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="embeddedServiceCustomLabels" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}EmbeddedServiceCustomLabel" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="iconUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isDisplayedOnPageLoad" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="itemName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="osOptionsHideInIOS" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="osOptionsHideInLinuxOS" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="osOptionsHideInMacOS" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="osOptionsHideInOtherOS" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="osOptionsHideInWindowsOS" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="phoneNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="shouldOpenUrlInSameTab" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getEmbeddedServiceCustomLabels

      public List<EmbeddedServiceCustomLabel> getEmbeddedServiceCustomLabels()
      Gets the value of the embeddedServiceCustomLabels property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the embeddedServiceCustomLabels property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getEmbeddedServiceCustomLabels().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list EmbeddedServiceCustomLabel

      Returns:
      The value of the embeddedServiceCustomLabels property.
